segments.text: Welcome back to another episode of
Startups to the Rest of Us. I'm Rob
Walling and in this episode I'm going to
look back and revisit my predictions

going to look ahead at some predictions
I have for 2026. And I'm also going to
reflect on a few new concepts introduced

well as some of the accomplishments of

Seed. Before I dive into that, this

startupsfortherest us.com. We are close

for the rest of us.com.
